name: The Train (3/3) - [burgerkiss]
description:
After a long, unentertaining day at school, as per usual, you take the train back home, as the school is quite far from the residential areas. Unfortunately, summer's coming up soon, so days are getting longer and hotter, bringing sweat and discomfort. This also means that, when you enter the train car, you come across a group of five girls that you know and know you. The girls part wasn't expected, but it's happening now. You just wanna go home, man...

Well, 3/3, final bit, yay. I said in the comments/reviews/whatever in my last train bot that I might do individual ones for the schoolgirl eeveelutions, and I wanna know if anybody wants them made before I make them, or I might just do them anyways, I don't know right now. But anyways, enjoy this, I will make more stuff in the future, have a good one.

Also you're going to have to specify what subject Reshiram teaches in this bot. Other than that, have fun.

Yep, token-heavy again.
